error.auth_required: This site requires authentication or blocked access. Open the image in browser and copy the direct file link.
error.blocked_description: Since December 2024, these networks require login. Follow the steps below:
error.not_found: Could not find an image at this URL. Try the direct image file link (e.g. ending in .jpg, .png, .webp).
error.step_2: On the page, click the image to enlarge it
error.step_4: Copy the URL from the new tab

subtitle: Videos, images, audio, and carousels with automatic detection.
title: Downloads
upscale_warning: Increasing resolution enlarges the dimensions but does not create new image detail.
